Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Jiangsu Nanbian Electric Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Nanbian Electric Co., Ltd. presents highly deceptive characteristics of a 'heavy industry shell company / engineering subcontracting shell'. The massive Apple Inc. consumer electronics OEM system preset at the bottom layer has been thoroughly cleared by the forensic engine. The official commercial system, because of its name 'Nanbian Electric' and the massive listing of 'transformer, power distribution switch control equipment manufacturing' in its license, naturally categorized it into the heavy-asset 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing'. However, the physical probe and historical snapshots directly tore off this industrial disguise: this old company, established in 2002, originally had the name 'Nanjing Yitao Sci-Tech & Trade Co., Ltd.', which was purely a commercial shell. Later it moved to Zhenjiang New Area, changed its name to the extremely grandiose 'Jiangsu Nanbian', marked its registered capital up to 50 million, but the paid-in capital is only 900,000. Most fatally, its 2024 insured headcount is only '6 people'. 6 people, in a corner of a factory or an office in Zhenjiang New Area, are going to simultaneously 'manufacture' large power distribution switches, photovoltaic equipment, environmental protection equipment, batteries, and even build 'containers' and 'new energy prime mover equipment'? This is absolutely impossible in terms of physics and industrial logic. Combined with the first item on its license, 'construction engineering operations; electrical installation services', the truth comes to light: this is a 'Small-scale Power Engineering Contractor & Proxy' operating under the guise of heavy industry manufacturing. They don't build transformers; they just buy transformers to install for clients, or utilize this shell possessing a '50-million registered capital' and a full set of 'manufacturing' terms to win projects during bidding.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 77)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SMALL-SCALE POWER CONTRACTOR & TRADING SHELL
